system.description: When you perform sleight of hand on an unwary mark, you succeed and no one's the wiser. If you're being watched, roll +DEX: on a 10+, you succeed and no one's the wiser; on a 7-9, you succeed OR no one's the wiser (your choice).

success.value: You succeed and no one's the wiser.

partial.value: You succeed OR no one's the wiser (your choice).
